g.title: agentic_plane
g.text: OpenMalLab - Agentic Analyst Plane (agents propose, the spine disposes)

g.title: cluster_spine
g.text: deterministic spine (trusted; the AI can never change or delay it)

g.title: cluster_plane
g.text: AI-analyst plane (isolated network, no egress, untrusted)

g.title: cluster_roster
g.text: Pydantic-AI roster (jailed; each agent typed, cites facts, never a verdict)

g.title: cluster_kb
g.text: Knowledge (deterministic memory; curated outranks ingest, always)
